chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-754 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.423/2019 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A No.4100/2018 4. For hearing of main case 29.01.2019. Mr. Ali Nawaz Chandio, advocate for the petitioners *** 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. By means of this petition, the petitioners are seeking direction to the respondents to keep mutation of record of rights of land in the name of petitioners. Alongwith petition, the petitioners have submitted a photo-state copy of Form-VII in support of their case. We have heard the learned counsel and found that no ‘title documents’ alongwith petition have been filed to show that any land belongs to the petitioners. The photo-state copy of Form-VII attached with the petition shows that subject land is an un-surveyed land. Learned counsel for the petitioners has not been able to satisfy the Court as to how the petitioners became owners of an un-surveyed land. The petition probably is not maintainable, which is accordingly dismissed in limine alongwith listed application(s). The petitioners may, however, avail their remedy before the appropriate forum, if provided under the law. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
